description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a smooth, light gray tabletop supported by four slender white metal legs. On the desk surface, there is a large RGB-backlit keyboard, a flat-screen monitor mounted on an adjustable arm, and a compact desktop computer tower. Several cables are visible, including a power cord extending from the desk. The desk appears to be designed for computer work, with ample space for peripherals and accessories. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for a contemporary workspace.
description: A sleek, modern desk with a light gray top, white metal legs, and computer workstation setup including a monitor, keyboard, and desktop tower.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full desk surface, monitor on an arm, keyboard, desktop tower, and visible cables.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the monitor arm's profile, the desktop tower, and the depth of the desk.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the monitor, the desktop tower, and the cable extending from the desk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the desktop tower and the cable, with less visibility of the monitor and keyboard.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the keyboard and monitor arm, with the desktop tower positioned to one side and cables extending from the back.
